revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:仏堂, en:Dō (architecture)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4528287 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:仏堂 | revid=4528287 --> ==ページ名変更について== 「仏堂」という項目名への移動を提案します。このページは当初「金堂」という項目名だったものが「仏殿」に移動されています。「仏殿」の語は「日本書紀」にも見えるもので、現状のままでもよいかもしれませんが、仏教寺院において仏像を安置し、礼拝供養し、仏事を行う建物を総称するもっとも中立的・包括的な単語は「仏堂」ではないかと思われます。[[利用者:Urania|Urania]] 2006年2月4日 (土) 09:43 (UTC)
:（賛成）仏堂は確かに包括的な用語ですので賛成致します。[[本堂]]の方が知名度があるような気もするのですが、仏堂は大正蔵54巻の梵語雜名にsattva-kuriの訳語として記され、従って唐代には既に使用されていたと考えられますので、歴史的根拠もあるようです。--[[利用者:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2006年2月11日 (土) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201577262 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Dō (architecture) | revid=1201577262 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y|religion=y}} }} == Move discussion in progress ==
There is a move discussion in progress on [[Talk:Kaisando#Requested move 11 August 2020 |Talk:Kaisando]] which affects this page. Please participate on that page and not in this talk page section. Thank you. <!-- Talk:Kaisando crosspost --> —[[User:RMCD bot|RMCD bot]] 17:47, 11 August 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4528287 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:仏堂 | revid=4528287 --> ==ページ名変更について== 「仏堂」という項目名への移動を提案します。このページは当初「金堂」という項目名だったものが「仏殿」に移動されています。「仏殿」の語は「日本書紀」にも見えるもので、現状のままでもよいかもしれませんが、仏教寺院において仏像を安置し、礼拝供養し、仏事を行う建物を総称するもっとも中立的・包括的な単語は「仏堂」ではないかと思われます。[[User:Urania|Urania]] 2006年2月4日 (土) 09:43 (UTC)
:（賛成）仏堂は確かに包括的な用語ですので賛成致します。[[本堂]]の方が知名度があるような気もするのですが、仏堂は大正蔵54巻の梵語雜名にsattva-kuriの訳語として記され、従って唐代には既に使用されていたと考えられますので、歴史的根拠もあるようです。--[[User:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2006年2月11日 (土) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201577262 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Dō (architecture) | revid=1201577262 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y|religion=y}} }} == Move discussion in progress ==
There is a move discussion in progress on [[Talk:Kaisando#Requested move 11 August 2020 |Talk:Kaisando]] which affects this page. Please participate on that page and not in this talk page section. Thank you. <!-- Talk:Kaisando crosspost --> —[[User:RMCD bot|RMCD bot]] 17:47, 11 August 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:wikipedia>迴廊彼端]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=D%C5%8D_%28architecture%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=D%C5%8D_%28architecture%29 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4528287 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:仏堂 | revid=4528287 --> ==ページ名変更について== 「仏堂」という項目名への移動を提案します。このページは当初「金堂」という項目名だったものが「仏殿」に移動されています。「仏殿」の語は「日本書紀」にも見えるもので、現状のままでもよいかもしれませんが、仏教寺院において仏像を安置し、礼拝供養し、仏事を行う建物を総称するもっとも中立的・包括的な単語は「仏堂」ではないかと思われます。[[User:Urania|Urania]] 2006年2月4日 (土) 09:43 (UTC)
:（賛成）仏堂は確かに包括的な用語ですので賛成致します。[[本堂]]の方が知名度があるような気もするのですが、仏堂は大正蔵54巻の梵語雜名にsattva-kuriの訳語として記され、従って唐代には既に使用されていたと考えられますので、歴史的根拠もあるようです。--[[User:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2006年2月11日 (土) 11:26 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201577262 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Dō (architecture) | revid=1201577262 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y|religion=y}} }} == Move discussion in progress ==
There is a move discussion in progress on [[Talk:Kaisando#Requested move 11 August 2020 |Talk:Kaisando]] which affects this page. Please participate on that page and not in this talk page section. Thank you. <!-- Talk:Kaisando crosspost --> —[[User:RMCD bot|RMCD bot]] 17:47, 11 August 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
